books.title: Colored Reading Strips
books.rationale: Helpful for people with a variety of visual processing differences. This multipack provides different colors to experiment with. Once a helpful color has been identified, it can be useful to get several in that color to use as bookmarks.
books.note: The color is not merely for interest and 2-4 very different colors should be tried before deciding whether they are helpful or not.  Children can often identify for themselves the most helpful color, but teachers can have them read aloud for a simple assessment of whether accuracy and ease are improved.
books.usedInText: Many Subjects
programList: Used across the curriculum in 3 or more subjects.

books.title: Composition Notebooks with Colored Paper
books.rationale: Helpful for children with a variety of visual processing differences.  When colored reading strips have indicated that tinted paper alleviates visual stress, the same color paper can be used to help with written work, including Copywork, Math, etc.
books.note: Composition notebooks with colored paper are not as readily available, so sometimes the closest color (on the color wheel) may need to be substituted.  The links provided are for 2 different colors.
books.maySub: any brand with an appropriate color paper.
